title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: 389-ds:1.4 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for 389-ds:1.4 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: 389 Directory Server is an LDAP version 3 (LDAPv3) compliant server. The base packages include the Lightweight Directory Access Protocol (LDAP) server and command-line utilities for server administration. Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Error showing local password policy on web UI [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-111226)  AddressSanitizer: memory leak in memberof_add_memberof_attr [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-113976)  subtree search statistics for index lookup does not report ancestorid/entryrdn lookups (JIRA:RHEL-117457)  Crash if repl keep alive entry can not be created [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-117752)  Replication online reinitialization of a large database gets stalled. [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-117759)  Statistics about index lookup report a wrong duration [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-117765)  Improve the way to detect asynchronous operations in the access logs [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-123228)  Typo in errors log after a Memberof fixup task. [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-123254)  LDAP high CPU usage while handling indexes with IDL scan limit at INT_MAX [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-123269)  The new ipahealthcheck test ipahealthcheck.ds.backends.BackendsCheck raises CRITICAL issue [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-123276)  When deferred memberof update is enabled after the server crashed it should not launch memberof fixup task by default [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-123363)  IPA health check up script shows time skew is over 24 hours [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-123365)  Changelog trimming - add number of scanned entries to the log [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-123920)  CWE-532 Created user password hash available to see in audit log [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-126512)  Fix paged result search locking [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-129578)  On RHDS 12.6 The user password policy for a user was created, but the pwdpolicysubentry attribute for this user incorrectly points to the People OU password policy instead of the specific user policy.  [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-130900)  Can't rename users member of automember rule [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-80491)  Some replication status data are reset upon a restart. [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-87191)  Extend log of operations statistics in access log (JIRA:RHEL-89785)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64

fixes.description: subtree search statistics for index lookup does not report ancestorid/entryrdn lookups
Extend log of operations statistics in access log

full_text:
An update for 389-ds:1.4 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

389 Directory Server is an LDAP version 3 (LDAPv3) compliant server. The base packages include the Lightweight Directory Access Protocol (LDAP) server and command-line utilities for server administration. Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Error showing local password policy on web UI [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-111226)  AddressSanitizer: memory leak in memberof_add_memberof_attr [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-113976)  subtree search statistics for index lookup does not report ancestorid/entryrdn lookups (JIRA:RHEL-117457)  Crash if repl keep alive entry can not be created [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-117752)  Replication online reinitialization of a large database gets stalled. [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-117759)  Statistics about index lookup report a wrong duration [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-117765)  Improve the way to detect asynchronous operations in the access logs [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-123228)  Typo in errors log after a Memberof fixup task. [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-123254)  LDAP high CPU usage while handling indexes with IDL scan limit at INT_MAX [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-123269)  The new ipahealthcheck test ipahealthcheck.ds.backends.BackendsCheck raises CRITICAL issue [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-123276)  When deferred memberof update is enabled after the server crashed it should not launch memberof fixup task by default [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-123363)  IPA health check up script shows time skew is over 24 hours [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-123365)  Changelog trimming - add number of scanned entries to the log [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-123920)  CWE-532 Created user password hash available to see in audit log [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-126512)  Fix paged result search locking [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-129578)  On RHDS 12.6 The user password policy for a user was created, but the pwdpolicysubentry attribute for this user incorrectly points to the People OU password policy instead of the specific user policy.  [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-130900)  Can't rename users member of automember rule [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-80491)  Some replication status data are reset upon a restart. [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-87191)  Extend log of operations statistics in access log (JIRA:RHEL-89785)
